name: wabe-gmbh-portal
description: Wabe GmbH Customer Portal - Secure file management system

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ..
scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.audit: npm audit && cd backend && npm audit && cd ../frontend && npm audit

author: Wabe GmbH
